Title: Successful Login
Preconditions: User has registered and is logged out.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page (Page 1).
2. Enter a valid email address.
3. Enter a valid password.
4. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the home page.

Title: Invalid Email
Preconditions: User has registered and is logged out.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page (Page 1).
2. Enter an invalid email address.
3. Enter a valid password.
4. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user remains on the login page.

Title: Invalid Password
Preconditions: User has registered and is logged out.
Test Data: Valid email address and invalid password.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page (Page 1).
2. Enter a valid email address.
3. Enter an invalid password.
4. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user remains on the login page.

Title: Empty Email
Preconditions: User has registered and is logged out.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page (Page 1).
2. Leave the email field empty.
3. Enter a valid password.
4. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user remains on the login page.

Title: Empty Password
Preconditions: User has registered and is logged out.
Test Data: Valid email address and empty password field.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page (Page 1).
2. Enter a valid email address.
3. Leave the password field empty.
4. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user remains on the login page.

Title: Successful Registration
Test Data: Valid email, password, and personal information.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page (Page 1).
2. Enter a valid email address.
3. Enter a valid password.
4. Enter personal information (name, surname, etc.).
5. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: User is registered, and a confirmation email is sent.

Title: Invalid Email
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page (Page 1).

1. Navigate to the registration page (Page 1).
2. Enter a valid email address.
